message:
feat(config): add trust score, decay factor, and thresholds config merge and env overrides

Profile merge:
- Trust section now supports min_trust_score and decay_factor overrides
  with MergeDecision recording
- New thresholds section with five fields: max_failure_rate,
  min_quality_score, max_variance_pct, regression_threshold_pct,
  min_resilience_score — each with MergeDecision tracking

Env overrides:
- FRANKEN_NODE_TRUST_MIN_TRUST_SCORE and FRANKEN_NODE_TRUST_DECAY_FACTOR
  env vars are now applied via apply_env_field_opt_f64

Tests:
- resolve_applies_trust_score_and_threshold_file_profile_overrides:
  verifies strict profile overrides trust and threshold values
- resolve_applies_trust_score_env_overrides: verifies env vars are
  applied and generate MergeStage::Env decisions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
